Short CV

Dr. Gamze Uslu earned the B.Sc., M.Sc. and Ph.D. degrees in computer engineering with full scholarship in 2007-2011, 2011-2013 and 2013-2022 respectively at Yeditepe University, İstanbul, Turkey, where she also performed as a graduate assistant between 2011-2019. Since 2011, she has participated in various research studies. She published with international journals and conferences of publishers such as IEEE, Elsevier and Springer including “IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics” and “Expert Systems with Applications”. Since March 2022 she works as an Assistant Professor of Computer Engineering at Üsküdar University, İstanbul, Turkey.
